languages.text: "Логово противника — ксеноруины, где пропал святейший Себериан фон Валанциус, Ваша Светлость".
"The enemy's base is at the xenoruins where most holy Seberian von Valancius disappeared, Your {mf|Lordship|Ladyship}."
languages.original_text: "Логово противника — ксеноруины, где пропал святейший Себериан фон Валанциус, Ваша Светлость".

traits.locale_text: "The enemy's base is at the xenoruins where most holy Seberian von Valancius disappeared, Your {mf|Lordship|Ladyship}."
"The enemy's base is at the xenoruins where most holy Seberian von Valancius disappeared, Your {mf|Lordship|Ladyship}."
"I found the Castellan's papers, Your {mf|Lordship|Ladyship}. The governor supposed that the enemy's base of operations was at the xenoruins where Seberian disappeared."
"The enemy's base is at the xenoruins where most holy Seberian von Valancius disappeared, Your {mf|Lordship|Ladyship}."
"The enemy's base is at the xenoruins where most holy Seberian von Valancius disappeared, Your {mf|Lordship|Ladyship}."

languages.text: 「城代の文書を見つけました、{mf|閣下|閣下}。総督は、敵の作戦拠点はセベリアンが行方不明になったゼノ遺跡にあると考えていたようです」
languages.original_text: "I found the Castellan's papers, Your {mf|Lordship|Ladyship}. The governor supposed that the enemy's base of operations was at the xenoruins where Seberian disappeared."

traits.locale_text: 「城代の文書を見つけました、{mf|閣下|閣下}。総督は、敵の作戦拠点はセベリアンが行方不明になったゼノ遺跡にあると考えていたようです。」

languages.text: « La base de l'ennemi se trouve dans les xénoruines où le très vénéré Seberian von Valancius a disparu, Votre Seigneurie. »
languages.original_text: "The enemy's base is at the xenoruins where most holy Seberian von Valancius disappeared, Your {mf|Lordship|Ladyship}."

traits.locale_text: « La base de l'ennemi se trouve dans les xénoruines où le très vénéré Seberian von Valancius a disparu, Votre Seigneurie. »

languages.text: "Düşmanın üssü, kutsal Seberian von Valancius'un kaybolduğu zeno harabelerinde {mf|Lord|Leydi} Hazretleri."
languages.original_text: "The enemy's base is at the xenoruins where most holy Seberian von Valancius disappeared, Your {mf|Lordship|Ladyship}."

traits.locale_text: "Düşmanın üssü, kutsal Seberian von Valancius'un kaybolduğu zeno harabelerinde {mf|Lord|Leydi} Hazretleri."

languages.text: "Der Feind hat seine Basis in den Xenoruinen, in denen der hochheilige Seberian von Valancius verschwand, Eure {mf|Lordschaft|Ladyschaft}."
languages.original_text: "The enemy's base is at the xenoruins where most holy Seberian von Valancius disappeared, Your {mf|Lordship|Ladyship}."

traits.locale_text: "Der Feind hat seine Basis in den Xenoruinen, in denen der hochheilige Seberian von Valancius verschwand, Eure {mf|Lordschaft|Ladyschaft}."

languages.text: «La base del enemigo se encuentra en las xenoruinas en las que desapareció el sacrosanto Seberian von Valancius, mi{mf|lord|lady}».
languages.original_text: "The enemy's base is at the xenoruins where most holy Seberian von Valancius disappeared, Your {mf|Lordship|Ladyship}."

traits.locale_text: «La base del enemigo se encuentra en las xenoruinas en las que desapareció el sacrosanto Seberian von Valancius, mi{mf|lord|lady}».

languages.text: “大人，敌人的总据点就在那片异形遗迹里，也就是至圣的塞贝里安·冯·瓦兰修斯失踪的地方。”
languages.original_text: "The enemy's base is at the xenoruins where most holy Seberian von Valancius disappeared, Your {mf|Lordship|Ladyship}."

traits.locale_text: “大人，敌人的总据点就在那片异形遗迹里，也就是至圣的塞贝里安·冯·瓦兰修斯失踪的地方。”
